'''Qes Dollis''' was the manager of the [[Sandstorm Shipping Concern]], located at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
Qes attempted to gain control of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation after the death of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. His efforts put him at odds with [[Kisa Shaki]], who had taken over the [[Swift Hutt Spacer's Service Depot]] at the same time. As a result, supporters of both criminals began a gang war. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attempted to bring the conflict to an end as a result.

Qes Dollis' efforts appear to have come to naught, as [[Talon Karrde]] was reported to have eventually inherited control of much of Jabba's smuggler contacts on Tatooine.

==Personality==
Qes fancied himself a civilized businessbeing, intelligent, and charming.

==Behind the scenes==
''Secrets of Tatooine'' makes it clear that Qes Dollis would not become a major figure in Tatooine's smuggling community, though only by inference, since Lady [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian's]] attempts to take over the smuggling business are said to have failed due to the smugglers joining with Karrde.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-05-XX -->''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]''
*<!-- 2001-09-XX -->''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]''
